artifact_name: SpecShift Terminal Intelligence v0.5 Generation Acceptance Rules
status: internal acceptance rules, not validated benchmark
purpose: Define what must be true before accepting a generated v0.5 adversarial suite.
acceptance_rules: Generated suite must contain exactly 25 test cases.
Every case must use a controlled category.
Every case must include a visible case-level failure_column.
Every scoring_rubric dimension must use expected_behavior, pass_condition, and fail_condition.
Rubric dimension must be failure_column_quality, not failure_column.
No benchmark, certification, compliance, security-tool, audit-replacement, or deployment-readiness claims.
All scenarios must be synthetic and non-operational.
Buyer-facing language must use structured internal review checklist, not validated scoring system.
The suite is acceptable for internal generation/review only, not external buyer-facing use.
next_action: Generate v0.5 suite, save as v0_5/unknown_domain_adversarial_suite_v0_5.json, then run validator before committing.
